title: Trip documents
description: A document the traveller dropped into a trip — a pasted booking confirmation, a forwarded itinerary, an e-ticket, a passport/visa note — that the records analyst reads and turns into structured trip data.

tripId.description: the trip this document belongs to

kind.description: the document type: 'booking_pdf' | 'ticket_image' | 'itinerary' | 'passport_visa' | 'place_photo' | 'other' — the analyst may correct a guessed kind

filename.description: original file/name the user gave the document

mime.description: MIME hint for the source, e.g. 'text/plain', 'application/pdf'

content.description: the pasted text of the document — the everyday copy-paste case the analyst extracts from (multipart blob upload is deferred)

sourceUrl.description: optional URL the analyst may webFetch for more detail (a booking-management link, a place page)

status.description: 'pending' when uploaded, 'analyzing' while the analyst runs, 'analyzed' when done, 'error' on failure

summary.description: markdown summary of what the analyst found and wrote back; empty while pending

error.description: a short reason set when status is 'error'
